run_summary.summary:
Scanned 17 emails across 12+ threads — here's what's actionable:

🚨 **SOJOS contract just landed (Apr 15)**: Ruby from SOJOS sent the contract attachment AND is asking what content Liz wants to create. Glasses are already at the house. This needs attention TODAY — moved to Contract.

✅ **Whisker content submitted (Apr 14)**: Liz sent the Drive link to Cheyenne Mabey for approval. Ball is in Whisker's court — moved to Approval.

📦 **BHG x Walmart moving forward**: Liz sent her shipping address to Gretta (BHG Collective) on Apr 14. Product is on its way for the outdoor living campaign.

🔴 **Dreo is urgent**: Posting window opened TODAY (Apr 15–30) and Yaki at Vanzo still hasn't responded to the $3K quote from Apr 1. Liz followed up Apr 14. If no word by Apr 17, this deal may be dead — window's too tight.

📋 **Linkind (solar pathway lights)**: Liz pushed back to the collab platform Apr 14 — said concept requirements are beyond the payment scope, product hasn't arrived yet, and she's out of town Apr 16–19 (can't shoot until week of Apr 20). Asked them to have the brand email her directly.

Batch of follow-ups sent Apr 14 after vacation: HelloFresh, Ollny, Govee, Bringnox, Rust-Oleum — all now waiting on brand.

One new inbound: xTool (laser cutting/engraving, 1M+ creator community) pitched a collab Apr 15 — 80W CO2 laser valued at ~$10K. Worth a look if it fits Liz's content.

suggestions.message: Dreo's posting window is OPEN NOW (Apr 15–30). Still no reply from Yaki at Vanzo to the $3K quote sent Apr 1. Liz followed up Apr 14. If no response by Apr 17, this deal is probably dead — the window doesn't leave room for back-and-forth.

Ruby sent the contract AND wants to know Liz's content concept. One reply can do both: sign/return the contract + share the concept direction. Liz should aim to get this done today (Apr 16 next action).

xTool (laser cutting/engraving brand, 1M+ global creators) pitched a collab Apr 15 — Laura at gengchunhong@makeblock.com, subject 'xTool Collab // 80W CO2 Laser for Bigger Projects'. They're offering the xTool P3 CO2 laser (~$10K product value). Could be a great fit for DIY/home content — worth a reply if interested.

deals.next_action: Review SOJOS contract and reply to Ruby with content concept
